summary: Only stable, cross-month, declarative editorial preferences may be approved for Honcho writes.

preferences.candidate_preference: Readers show sustained interest in a stable topic or editorial angle across multiple months.
preferences.evidence_summary: Summarize only aggregated evidence; do not include raw event identifiers, single-item anecdotes, or PII.
preferences.notes: Analyst proposes; Editor approves or rejects. Repo should not perform routine direct Honcho writes during normal runs.
